author: maxine--futura
content:
Plan: This is Work Package 1 (WP1) of the ecosystem coordination design (.design/ecosystem-coordination.md). Work happens in ~/code/forecast/atdata-lexicon repo.

Scope:
1. Create test-vectors/ directory with shard-roundtrip vectors (simple-100.json, numpy-arrays.json, metadata-samples.json). Each vector is a self-contained JSON file specifying input samples and expected output (keys, values, shapes, dtypes).
2. Create .atdata-ecosystem.json declaring role=contract, capabilities list.
3. Create .github/workflows/dispatch-consumers.yml that fires repository_dispatch to forecast-bio/atdata, forecast-bio/atdata-rs, forecast-bio/atdata-app on PRs to develop/main. Event type: lexicon-compat-check. Payload includes lexicon_ref.
4. Create .github/workflows/ecosystem-status.yml (weekly scheduled) that fetches .atdata-ecosystem.json from each consumer via gh api and publishes ecosystem-status.json as workflow artifact.

Acceptance criteria: AC-4 (vectors), AC-5 (ecosystem json), AC-6 (dispatch), AC-8 (aggregator).
